title: TV shortlist — 55–65″ · under 30,000 EGP · official manufacturers only
rankMethod: Quality-first: image panel (Mini-LED > QLED/NanoCell > LED) + brand processing + OS (webOS/Tizen > Google TV > Android TV > basic smart) + design + features + size; stock and price break ties. Pros/cons cover each dimension.

filtersApplied.sources: official manufacturer websites in Egypt only
prefer: AI processing and built-in receiver when useful
in-stock models when quality is comparable

shoppingRoute: Sort by Our rank — quality-first (panel + OS + design + features), not cheapest-first
Top tier under 30k: Mini-LED (LG QNED / Samsung M70H) for the best picture
Mid tier: Samsung QLED / LG NanoCell for color + polished Tizen/webOS
Value: TCL/Fresh QLED or Sharp frameless if you want size + Google TV under less spend
Local practical: Tornado Android + built-in receiver when dish setup matters more than panel class
Prefer in-stock official carts; re-check price/stock the day you buy

kits.name: Picture-first under 30k
kits.note: Mini-LED LG QNED or Samsung M70H — best image quality in band
kits.rule: Pick highest-ranked Mini-LED that is in stock

kits.name: OS + design priority
kits.note: webOS NanoCell / Tizen QLED — polished software and cleaner living-room look
kits.rule: Prefer Samsung or LG official store even if slightly higher

kits.name: 65″ immersion under 30k
kits.note: LG 65 QNED / 65 Nano / Samsung 65 U8000H / Sharp 65

kits.name: Value + apps
kits.note: TCL/Fresh QLED Google TV or Sharp frameless for app ecosystem without flagship spend
kits.rule: Confirm built-in receiver only if you need satellite

excludedExamples.name: TCL 4K Smart Frameless QD-Mini LED TV 55 Inch Built-In Receiver 55C6K

disclaimer: Scraped 2026-07-20 via Playwright from official manufacturer sites in Egypt only (Samsung.com/eg, LG.com/eg_en, Elaraby Group, Fresh.com.eg). Ranked by image quality, OS, design, features, and brand — not by price alone. Beko had no 55–65″ models; Haier listed models without EG e-commerce prices; Hisense Middle East site was unavailable. Prices and stock change — re-verify before purchase.

items.name: 65 inch LG QNED AI QNED7E Mini LED 4K Smart TV 2026
items.summary: 65″ Mini-LED 4K UHD · webOS. Ranked by image quality, OS, design, features, and brand. Availability: in stock.
pros: Image: Mini-LED / multi-zone local dimming — strongest contrast & HDR punch in this budget
Quality: LG processing + Egypt service network — better upscaling, motion, and warranty path
OS: LG webOS — polished home UI, Magic Remote pointer, strong long-term app support
Design: Premium chassis/stand language from a global design line
Features: AI picture processing — auto upscaling and scene optimization for mixed content
Features: 2026 model year — fresher smart features and a longer support window
Size: 65" — max living-room immersion in the 55–65 band
Buy path: Official manufacturer channel (LG Egypt official)
cons: Value: Near the 30k ceiling — little headroom for stand or soundbar
Tradeoff: Mini-LED premium eats most of the 30k budget — plan soundbar/stand separately
items.scrapeNote: Playwright official manufacturer scrape 2026-07-20 — re-verify price/stock/warranty
